description: Simulate a transition to on-board ticketing in the Bologna Pasubio scenario (/home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/) by setting all bus stop dwell times to exactly 60 seconds. Create a modified route file 'pasubio_busses_slow.rou.xml' where every <stop> element has duration="60" and no 'until' attribute. Using a new configuration file 'run_slow_buses.sumocfg' based on 'run.sumocfg', generate tripinfo output at '/home/ga/SUMO_Output/tripinfos_slow.xml'. Calculate the average duration for all vehicles with 'bus' in their ID (case-insensitive) and record the value rounded to two decimal places in a report at '/home/ga/SUMO_Output/bus_impact_report.txt' using the format: average_bus_duration_seconds: <VALUE>
